## Summary

Describe what this change does and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Infrastructure or configuration change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security

## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt` and `make validate` pass
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] No secrets are committed
- [ ] Documentation is updated where relevant
- [ ] Security impact is described if the change affects the threat model
